summary: The agent failed to implement the rich input field. It only began examining the codebase (reading the existing input component and App component) but did not proceed to any actual implementation — no libraries were installed, no files were created or modified, and none of the required features were implemented.

concerns.description: The task was not completed at all. The agent appears to have stopped during the initial exploration/reading phase without producing any code changes.
No library was installed, no editor component was created, no keyboard shortcuts were implemented, and no styling was done.
The agent's output suggests it may have hit an error or timeout during the exploration phase, preventing any progress on the actual implementation.

humanAttentionReason: The task completely failed with zero implementation progress. It needs to be re-run or manually completed. All requirements remain unaddressed: library installation, editor component creation, keyboard shortcuts, markdown highlighting, auto-expand, and backward compatibility.

reviewFindings.description: No implementation was produced. The agent only read existing files and then stopped.
